content:
# Decision: Deep Ingest — Multi-Signal Repo Understanding (Replaces "Codebase-to-Course" Framing)

## Context

Research (March 2026) into extracting architectural rationale from codebases found no tool combining code structure, git history, PR/issue context, and LLM synthesis. Initial framing borrowed the name "codebase-to-course" from an existing Claude Code skill (zarazhangrui/codebase-to-course) that generates HTML walkthroughs for humans. That name was misleading for corvia's use case.

## Decisions

### 1. Name: "Deep Ingest" (not "codebase-to-course")
Corvia's feature is about corvia understanding repos for itself and the agents it serves, not generating courses for humans. "Deep Ingest" extends the existing `corvia workspace ingest` concept. The output is knowledge entries in the graph, not rendered content.

### 2. Separate initiative, not P6
This is its own workstream. P6 (LLM-assisted summaries) is subsumed as Phase 1 of deep ingest. P1-P5 structural intelligence feeds into it but ships independently.

### 3. Adapter-per-signal architecture
Each knowledge signal is its own adapter. Adapters can be added, removed, or benchmarked independently.

| Signal | Adapter | Status |
|--------|---------|--------|
| Code structure | `adapter-git` | Exists |
| Git temporal history | `adapter-git-history` | Not started |
| PR/issue discussion | `adapter-github` (D44) | Not started |
| LLM synthesis | Kernel-level orchestration | Not started |

### 4. Delivery by user value, not by adapter
Phase 1 delivers user value (architectural understanding) using only existing adapter-git output. New adapters add depth in subsequent phases.

### 5. Benchmark each signal independently
Measure per-signal contribution to synthesis quality. Deprioritize signals that don't measurably improve understanding.

## Supersedes
- Earlier "codebase-to-course" design entry (same session)
- Earlier "adapter-per-signal architecture" decision entry (same session)
- P6 item in Structural Intelligence roadmap (P6 is now Phase 1 of deep ingest)

## Tracking
GitHub: chunzhe10/corvia#88
